positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: a curly-haired man in a fitted blue checked suit, light blue shirt, patterned tie and pocket square stands beside an ornate old stone-and-wood window facade, one hand in his trouser pocket and the other relaxed at his side, facing the camera in warm sunlight. Preserve the original aspect ratio, composition, identity, clothing, window reflection, stone wall, sidewalk depth and bench in the background. The first frame is already a calm fashion portrait, not the start of a walk. During the clip he makes one small completed pose adjustment: he breathes subtly, blinks once, lifts his chin a fraction and lets the relaxed hand and jacket fabric settle. By the final frames he holds a steady confident pose again. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable drift with gentle parallax, minimal and elegant. Add only subtle visible motion: tiny suit fabric movement, slight hair movement, soft shifting reflections in the window, and gentle sunlight-shadow shimmer. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable face and hands.
negative_prompt: Do not make the man walk away, turn his back, step forward, raise his arm, remove the hand from his pocket, change into another pose dramatically, smile broadly, speak, become a different person, create a second person from the window reflection, or change the suit, wall, window, sidewalk, bench or background architecture, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, distorted face, deformed hands, extra limbs, extra fingers, changing identity, changing clothes, extra people, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden pose change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic skin, text artifacts, logo distortion.
